Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Class FormulaSV

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.OperatorSV
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.FormulaSV
All Implemented Interfaces:
Operator, SchemaVariable, Sorted, Named, Operator, SortedOperator, ParsableVariable, Sorted, SyntaxElement, TerminalSyntaxElement, EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
public final class FormulaSV extends OperatorSV implements TerminalSyntaxElement
A schema variable that is used as placeholder for formulas.
